source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: S.S. Dora, Seward, Alaska
description: The steamship S.S. Dora at dock in Seward, Alaska. The Dora was one of the regular coastal steamers that connected Seward to other Southeast Alaska ports during the early 20th century.
alt: The steamship S.S. Dora docked at Seward, Alaska in the early 1900s
